    <div class="jobs-box--fadein jobs-box--full-width jobs-box--with-cta-large jobs-description
        
        
        
         jobs-description--reformatted
        
         job-details-module">

<!---->
      <article class="jobs-description__container
          ">
        <div class="jobs-description__content jobs-description-content
            ">
          <div class="jobs-box__html-content
              vLidMhgQDCrOJpnHLzOJMVfZFjfijaYFUM
              t-14 t-normal
              jobs-description-content__text--stretch" id="job-details" tabindex="-1">
            <h2 class="text-heading-large">
              About the job
            </h2>

<!---->            <div class="mt4">
                <p dir="ltr">
                  <span><p><span><strong><!---->Job Title: Software Engineer II<!----></strong></span></p></span><span><p><!---->Description: Builds and maintains scalable, high quality software solutions in a cloud based Agile environment. This role aligns to industry level titles such as Associate Software Engineer, Software Engineer.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span></p></span><span><p><span><strong><!---->Synopsis:<!----></strong></span><span class="white-space-pre"> </span>Designs and develops internet scale applications and supports throughout their lifecycle<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span></p></span><span><p><span><strong><!---->Responsibilities:<!----></strong></span></p></span><span><br></span><span>      <ul><span><br></span><li><!---->Developing and maintaining top-notch software applications built on private &amp; public cloud.<!----></li><li><!---->Architecting &amp; Designing applications by adapting proven industry best practices alongside the R&amp;D objectives.<!----></li><li><!---->Raising the bar on application &amp; infrastructure code quality.<!----></li><li><!---->Strengthening the application and platform Security by adopting security best practices.<!----></li><li><!---->Ensuring the Compatibility and Accessibility conformity along with various Non-Functional Requirements throughout the application lifecycle.<!----></li><li><!---->Automating functional &amp; other quality tests at different layers of the application to uncover issues as early as possible.<!----></li><li><!---->Improving application's ability to continuously integrate &amp; deploy to facilitate frequent and smaller releases with no customer impact.<!----></li><li><!---->Baking Observability into the applications, actively monitoring and resolving issues promptly.<!----></li><li><!---->Monitoring various performance indicators of the applications and making continuous improvements and optimizations.<!----></li><span><br></span></ul>
</span><span><br></span><span><p><span><strong><!---->Requirements:<!----></strong></span></p></span><span><br></span><span>      <ul><span><br></span><li><!---->A bachelor's degree in Software Engineering, Computing or a related field.<!----></li><li><!---->Minimum of 2 years of experience in Software Engineering.<!----></li><li><!---->An up-to-date knowledge on industry trends &amp; new developments in programming, application development and lifecycle management.<!----></li><li><!---->A passion for solving problems with innovative &amp; practical solutions.<!----></li><li><!---->Strong analytical and reasoning skills with the ability to visualize the outcomes.<!----></li><li><!---->Thorough knowledge on algorithms &amp; data structures.<!----></li><li><!---->Proficiency in at least two high level programming languages including Java and the ability to quickly adopt languages &amp; techniques.<!----></li><li><!---->Previous experience with ReactJS , Node and frameworks such as SpringBoot, Redux would be beneficial<!----></li><li><!---->Previous experience in MongoDB would be an added advantage<!----></li><li><!---->Practical experience in cloud environments, preferably in AWS would be beneficial<!----></li><li><!---->Ability to craft quality code and automate various types of tests on application components.<!----></li><li><!---->Proficiency in monitoring applications, troubleshooting and fixing application issues.<!----></li><li><!---->Thorough knowledge on the Non-Functional requirements of applications such as Security, Accessibility, Compatibility, Observability &amp; Availability.<!----></li><li><!---->Working knowledge on continuous integration and deployment.<!----></li><span><br></span></ul>
</span><span><br></span><span><p><span><strong><!---->Who we are:<!----></strong></span></p></span><span><p><!---->At Pearson, our purpose is simple: to help people realize the life they imagine through learning. We believe that every learning opportunity is a chance for a personal breakthrough. We are the world's lifelong learning company. For us, learning isn't just what we do. It's who we are. To learn more: We are Pearson.<!----></p></span><span><p><!---->Pearson is an Equal Opportunity Employer and a member of E-Verify. Employment decisions are based on qualifications, merit and business need. Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, ethnicity, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, national origin, protected veteran status, disability status or any other group protected by law. We actively seek qualified candidates who are protected veterans and individuals with disabilities as defined under VEVRAA and Section 503 of the Rehabilitation Act.<!----></p></span><span><p><!---->If you are an individual with a disability and are unable or limited in your ability to use or access our career site as a result of your disability, you may request reasonable accommodations by emailing TalentExperienceGlobalTeam@grp.pearson.com.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span></p></span><span><p><span><strong><!---->Job:<!----></strong></span><span class="white-space-pre"> </span>Engineering<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span></p></span><span><p><span><strong><!---->Job Family:<!----></strong></span><span class="white-space-pre"> </span>TECHNOLOGY<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span></p></span><span><p><span><strong><!---->Organization:<!----></strong></span><span class="white-space-pre"> </span>Higher Education<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span></p></span><span><p><span><strong><!---->Schedule:<!----></strong></span><span class="white-space-pre"> </span>FULL_TIME<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span></p></span><span><p><span><strong><!---->Workplace Type:<!----></strong></span><span class="white-space-pre"> </span>Hybrid<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span></p></span><span><p><span><strong><!---->Req ID:<!----></strong></span><span class="white-space-pre"> </span>23164<!----></p></span>
                </p>
<!---->            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="jobs-description__details">
<!---->          </div>
        </div>
      </article>

        Our purpose is simple: to help people realize the life they imagine through learning. We believe that every learning opportunity is a chance for a personal breakthrough. That’s why our c. 20,000 Pearson employees are committed to creating vibrant and enriching learning experiences designed for real-life impact. We are the world’s leading learning company, serving customers in nearly 200 countries with digital content, assessments, qualifications, and data. For us, learning isn’t just what we do. It's who we are.
